title: knowtion's ugly font
description: Changes Minecraft's font to a more tilted one
body:
# **About**

knowtion's ugly font changes default font of Minecraft, making it more tilted and, well, ugly. that also includes TNT, Enchanting Table icons and particles.

This pack currently supports Latin, Cyrillic, Greek, Hebrew, Upside Down Standard Galactic alphabets, aswell as ~100 different languages and dialects. I'll try to update the pack once a week or two to increase that number.

The pack includes 3 optional addons inside .zip archive:
- KUF: Colored Enchanting Table Particles (based on [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/))
- KUF: SGA TNT (based on Amare's [Galactic TNT](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/galactic-tnt/))
- KUF: SGA to Illageralt

Special thanks to [xllifi](https://modrinth.com/user/xllifi) and his [Asylum Notes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/asylum-notes)
resource pack for inspiring me to make this font
## **Contact**

If you want to ask a question, report an issue, leave a suggestion, or help with the development, DM me on Discord @knowtion
